What is the average trip duration by bor:
SELECT g.City AS Borough, AVG(t.TripDurationSeconds)/60 AS AvgDurationMinutes
FROM Trip t
JOIN Geography g ON t.PickupGeographyID = g.GeographyID
JOIN Date d ON t.DateID = d.DateID
WHERE d.IsWeekday = 1
GROUP BY g.City;
Show total trips and average fare per da:
SELECT d.Date, COUNT(*) AS TotalTrips, AVG(t.FareAmount) AS AvgFare
FROM Trip t
JOIN Date d ON t.DateID = d.DateID
WHERE d.Date >= DATEADD(day, -7, GETDATE())
GROUP BY d.Date
ORDER BY d.Date;
Compare average trip distance on rainy v:
SELECT w.PrecipitationInches, AVG(t.TripDistanceMiles) AS AvgDistance
FROM Trip t
JOIN Weather w ON t.DateID = w.DateID AND t.PickupGeographyID = w.GeographyID
GROUP BY w.PrecipitationInches;
How did snowfall affect trip volume in J:
SELECT w.PrecipitationInches, COUNT(*) AS TripCount
FROM Trip t
JOIN Weather w ON t.DateID = w.DateID AND t.PickupGeographyID = w.GeographyID
JOIN Date d ON t.DateID = d.DateID
WHERE d.MonthName = 'January'
GROUP BY w.PrecipitationInches;
List medallions with the highest number:
SELECT m.MedallionCode, COUNT(*) AS TripCount
FROM Trip t
JOIN Medallion m ON t.MedallionID = m.MedallionID
JOIN Date d ON t.DateID = d.DateID
WHERE d.Month = MONTH(GETDATE()) AND d.Year = YEAR(GETDATE())
GROUP BY m.MedallionCode
ORDER BY TripCount DESC;
Show hackney licences that had zero trip:
SELECT h.HackneyLicenseCode
FROM HackneyLicense h
LEFT JOIN Trip t ON h.HackneyLicenseID = t.HackneyLicenseID
LEFT JOIN Date d ON t.DateID = d.DateID
WHERE (d.Quarter = DATEPART(QUARTER, GETDATE())-1 OR d.Quarter IS NULL)
GROUP BY h.HackneyLicenseCode
HAVING COUNT(t.TripDistanceMiles) = 0;
What are the top 3 busiest hours for tri:
SELECT TOP 3 ti.HourNumber, COUNT(*) AS TripCount
FROM Trip t
JOIN Time ti ON t.PickupTimeID = ti.TimeID
JOIN Date d ON t.DateID = d.DateID
WHERE d.DayName IN ('Saturday','Sunday')
GROUP BY ti.HourNumber
ORDER BY TripCount DESC;
